title: Preserve I/O source errors
scenario: When file reading fails, the high-level config error should keep the original std::io::Error as its source.
instructions: Change FileRead to store std::io::Error, preserve the existing Display messages, and implement std::error::Error::source for that variant.

hints.body: Import std::error::Error and std::io, then change FileRead into FileRead(io::Error).
Keep the Display match from the starter. Only FileRead should return Some(error) from source(); the other variants return None.
One complete solution for Preserve I/O source errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: FileRead now carries the original io::Error and exposes it through Error::source while keeping the user-facing Display messages from the previous lesson.
